title: Kill fab uninstall legacy flags (C2) — drop --force/--interactive/--no-bootstrap/--no-mcp/--no-scaffold/--purge/--clean-empties; rename --plan → --dry-run; flip cleanEmpties to default behavior + delete option entirely
description: Symmetric mirror of TASK-001 on uninstall. Contract uninstall citty args from 11 flags to 4 (target/debug/yes + renamed dry-run). Delete --purge (knowledge preservation becomes unconditional), --clean-empties (becomes default-on behavior, option type DELETED entirely per clarification 5). Strip cleanEmpties threading through uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts (L24, L54, L191, L212, L234, L493, L538, L569, L604) — hardcode cleanEmpties:true throughout, then delete the option from BootstrapUninstallOptions and UninstallOptions types. Delete wizard cleanEmpties prompt at uninstall.ts:766-771. Force-confirm bypass at uninstall.ts:294 becomes args.yes-only. Lock check at L259 drops {force: args.force} opts. Delete --purge knowledge-preservation guard test (d) and --force already-missing test (g). Regenerate snapshot. Commit: `refactor(rc15): kill fab uninstall legacy flags — same kills + --purge + --clean-empties (default behavior); rename --plan → --dry-run`

files.target: L185-L240 (citty args), L259 (checkLockOrThrow), L294 (force-confirm bypass), L307-L327 (resolveUninstallCliIntent reducer + cleanEmpties default flip), L313-L315 + L344-L346 + L829-L831 (skipBootstrap/skipMcp/skipScaffold consumers), L317 + L392-L400 (purge consumers + wizard purge prompt), L646 (BootstrapUninstallOptions cleanEmpties threading — delete), L766-L771 (wizard cleanEmpties prompt — delete), UninstallArgs/UninstallOptions type defs
files.change: Delete args entries for force/interactive/bootstrap/mcp/scaffold/purge/clean-empties; rename plan→dry-run; drop force/skip*/purge/cleanEmpties from UninstallOptions; drop force opts from checkLockOrThrow; drop args.force from confirm bypass (args.yes alone gates); delete purge wizard prompt + knowledge-subdir guard (preservation becomes unconditional); delete cleanEmpties wizard prompt; remove BootstrapUninstallOptions.cleanEmpties threading from L646

files.target: L24 (signature opts), L54 (BootstrapUninstallOptions type def), L191/L212/L234/L493/L538/L569 (cleanEmpties option reads), L600-L606 (pruneArrayAtPath cleanEmpties guard), L604 (pruneArrayAtPath param)
files.change: Delete cleanEmpties from BootstrapUninstallOptions type at L54; remove all cleanEmpties parameter threading; collapse pruneArrayAtPath guard at L600-L606 to unconditional cascade-prune (the cleanEmpties:true default semantics)

Delete cli.uninstall.args.{force,interactive,no-bootstrap,no-mcp,no-scaffold,purge,clean-empties}.description; rename cli.uninstall.args.plan.description → cli.uninstall.args.dry-run.description; delete cli.uninstall.wizard.clean-empties + cli.uninstall.flags.* keys; update cli.uninstall.plan.summary template at L243 to drop purge={purge} clean-empties={cleanEmpties} placeholders
Mirror every en.ts deletion 1:1; update zh-CN plan.summary template parallel to en.ts

files.target: L7-L14 docstring, L132-L210 (case b --plan), L217-L266 (case d --purge), L340-L408 (case g --force already-missing), L468-L497 (non-interactive TTY --force bypass)
files.change: Delete describe block 'case (d) --purge with HOME-pinned personal root' entirely; delete describe 'case (g) --force on already-missing artifacts' (idempotency contract moves to default-behavior test); delete L468-L497 --force bypass test; rename --plan → --dry-run throughout case (b); update docstring at L7-L14 to drop killed contracts (d, e, g)
Strip explicit cleanEmpties:true args from runUninstall(target) invocations; if any cleanEmpties:false tests exist, delete (path no longer exists)
Regenerate via `vitest -u`; expected final shape: [debug, dry-run, target, yes]

implementation: Map every args.force / args.interactive / args.bootstrap / args.mcp / args.scaffold / args.purge / args['clean-empties'] / args.plan reference in uninstall.ts (grep -n)
Edit citty args:{} block at L185-L240: delete force/interactive/bootstrap/mcp/scaffold/purge/clean-empties; rename plan→dry-run
Edit UninstallArgs and UninstallOptions types: drop force/interactive/skipBootstrap/skipMcp/skipScaffold/purge/cleanEmpties fields
Edit resolveUninstallCliIntent at L307-L327: drop maps for killed flags; map args['dry-run']→planOnly
Edit checkLockOrThrow call at L259: drop {force: args.force} opts (becomes checkLockOrThrow(intent.target))
Edit force-confirm bypass at L294: change `args.yes !== true && args.force !== true` to `args.yes !== true`
Delete purge wizard prompt at L392-L400 + purge consumer at L317 (knowledge-subdir guard becomes unconditional preservation)
Delete clean-empties wizard prompt at L766-L771
Delete cleanEmpties threading at uninstall.ts:646 (BootstrapUninstallOptions construction)

Edit uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts: delete cleanEmpties field from BootstrapUninstallOptions at L54; remove cleanEmpties parameter from all 9 threading sites (L24, L54, L191, L212, L234, L493, L538, L569, L604); collapse pruneArrayAtPath guard at L600-L606 to unconditional cascade-prune

Edit i18n en.ts L228-L273: delete cli.uninstall.args.{force,interactive,no-*,purge,clean-empties}.description, cli.uninstall.wizard.clean-empties, cli.uninstall.flags.*, rename plan→dry-run; update plan.summary template at L243
Update uninstall.test.ts: delete describe (d) at L217-L266, delete describe (g) at L340-L408, delete L468-L497 force-bypass test, rename --plan args in case (b) at L132-L210, update docstring L7-L14
Update integration/uninstall-skills-and-hooks.test.ts: strip explicit cleanEmpties:true from runUninstall calls at L89/L177
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -u` to regenerate cli-surface.test.ts.snap uninstall block
git add + commit with message: `refactor(rc15): kill fab uninstall legacy flags — same kills + --purge + --clean-empties (default behavior); rename --plan → --dry-run`

reference.pattern: Symmetric to TASK-001 install pattern, PLUS default-flip pattern for --clean-empties: kill flag at citty → kill option at reducer → kill option at threading helper (uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts) → kill option from type defs → hardcode the previous-on behavior as unconditional logic.
reference.examples: Mirror TASK-001 install changes for symmetry. See exploration-cli-surface-removals.json uninstall.ts keyCode entries for L185-L240 args block, L307-L327 reducer, L646 BootstrapUninstallOptions threading.

criteria: uninstall.ts citty args block contains exactly 4 entries: target, debug, yes, dry-run (verified by reading)
Zero `cleanEmpties` references in uninstall.ts AND uninstall-skills-and-hooks.ts (grep returns 0; the option is fully deleted per clarification 5)
Zero `cli.uninstall.args.{force,interactive,no-bootstrap,no-mcp,no-scaffold,purge,clean-empties}.description` keys in en.ts AND zh-CN.ts
Zero `cli.uninstall.wizard.clean-empties` and `cli.uninstall.flags.*` keys in either locale
cli-surface.test.ts.snap uninstall args block enumerates exactly 4 args: debug, dry-run, target, yes
Single commit with specified commit message

rationale.chosen_approach: Mirror TASK-001 surgery for symmetry, plus aggressive cleanEmpties option deletion (not internal-toggle preservation) per clarification 5 + memory feedback_clean_slate.md. Pre-user state allows hard cleanup without compat shim.
alternatives_considered: Keep cleanEmpties as internal toggle defaulting to true (option 2 in clarification 5)
Soft-deprecate --purge by always preserving but emit notice
decision_factors: Symmetric to install kill for predictable rc.15 UX
Internal API surface clean-up is part of the contraction goal
rationale.tradeoffs: Internal callers (none exist outside CLI) lose the cleanEmpties:false escape; future rc.16 callers requiring empty-array preservation must add an explicit option back. Acceptable per zero-user state.

manual_checks: Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli build && node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs uninstall --help` — verify --help output lists only: target, debug, yes, dry-run
Run `node packages/cli/bin/fab.mjs uninstall --force /tmp/xyz` — expect citty error 'Unknown argument: --force'
Run fresh `fab install /tmp/xyz` then `fab uninstall --dry-run /tmp/xyz` — verify plan prints without writes; verify plan summary template does not mention purge or clean-empties placeholders
Run `fab uninstall /tmp/xyz` and verify .fabric/knowledge/ is preserved (purge guard now unconditional)
success_metrics: All tests pass: `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test` exit code 0
Snapshot diff at cli-surface.test.ts.snap reduces uninstall args from 11 entries to 4
